title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A multi-agent AI travel planning system built with LangGraph that uses four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and final responses. The system integrates Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs for real-time flight and hotel data.
